F3_duplicate_category_note: /product-category/portable-toilets (plural) is NOT a WordPress category. It renders 200 on www because the Next.js route /product-category/[slug] accepts any slug at request time and falls back to a title-cased name when no WP term matches. Only the singular portable-toilet has WP data. DUPLICATE — owner decision needed; nothing merged or redirected in this export.
hub_products_note: 14 keeper URLs are 2-segment /product/<slug>. On www these render via the /product/[category] listing route, but WooCommerce ALSO holds a product with the same slug; both the product object and the category data are exported.
